title: The Mystery of the Lost Explorer: The Fate of Percy Fawcett

scenes.text: An adventurer's quest for treasure led to his mysterious disappearance.
It happened in the Amazon Rainforest, Brazil, in 1925.
In 1925, Percy Fawcett vanished while searching for a legendary city of gold.
To this day, no trace of Fawcett has ever been found.
scenes.label: NEVER FOUND
scenes.sub: A mystery deep in the Amazon

scenes.text: Follow because some cases still need answers.

description: 📍 Amazon Rainforest, Brazil - 1925. Percy Fawcett disappeared while searching for a city of gold, leaving behind an enduring mystery. Follow for daily cold cases!
